title: Review and setlist: Demi Lovato brought her new era of music to TD Garden
author: Autumn Sloboda
bullets: Concert Reviews Demi Lovato brought her It’s Not That Deep tour to TD Garden Wednesday, but the loudest moments belonged to the songs fans have been belting for years.
Richard Shotwell/Invision/AP ShareSend this article to your social connections.
Demi Lovato brought a new era of music to TD Garden Wednesday night, but it was the songs fans grew up on that drew Boston’s loudest response.

title: Here’s the list of picks the Patriots have entering the 2026 NFL Draft

title: 2 charged in death of Mass. man whose body was found in S.C. trash can
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Crime David Hutchinson went missing shortly after arriving in South Carolina late last year in hopes of striking it rich.
David Hutchinson, a Massachusetts man found dead in South Carolina last week.

GoFundMe By Abby Patkin April 23, 2026 | 2:11 PM 2 minutes to read Authorities in South Carolina have charged two more people in the death of a Massachusetts man whose remains were found inside a trash can behind an abandoned house earlier this year.

title: Former Brigham and Women’s doctor Derrick Todd pleads not guilty to 81 new sexual assault charges
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Crime Prosecutors say Todd manipulated vulnerable patients into unnecessary and sometimes invasive exams, often making “crude sexual remarks.
” Dr.
Derrick Todd enters Suffolk Superior Court on Thursday, April 23, 2026.

title: Catch of the day? A sunken Subaru in the Sudbury River
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The driver escaped unharmed after his car rolled into Sudbury River, authorities say.
Wayland fire officials and District 14 dive team recover Subaru from Sudbury River.
Wayland Police Department A night of fishing ended with an unexpected recovery mission after a Subaru rolled into the Sudbury River Tuesday night.

title: UMass Amherst chef charged with wife’s murder in campus hotel room
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Crime Police say Jeffrey MacDonald admitted to beating his wife to death intentionally.
A student walks by Hotel UMass.

Jonathan Wiggs / The Boston Globe A man who’s reportedly an award-winning UMass Amherst chef has been arrested and charged with murder in connection with the death of his wife, who was also a UMass employee.

title: TD Garden unveils $100M revamp of premium suites
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Local News Construction of the 83 suites will begin this summer, adding high-end furnishes and an upgraded culinary program.
An exterior view of TD Garden.

Adam Glanzman, Getty Images North America TD Garden plans to invest $100 million to rebuild all 83 of its premium suites, introducing high-end furnishings and an upgraded food program, the arena announced Thursday.

title: Album review: Noah Kahan’s ‘The Great Divide’ showcases the artist’s staying power
